---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of the unexpected behaviour.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Run `portview ...`
2. See error / unexpected output

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include terminal output if possible.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **portview version:** (output of `portview --version`)
- **Running as Administrator / sudo:** Yes / No

## Additional context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots.
